ab: kiyumalra ku driya! ulraya i Apin i ruma?
en: A: Is Apin at home?

ab: ulraya i ruma taytaw. alamu usabak!
en: She’s at home, please come in.

ab: kiyumalra ku driya! ulraya i Agam i ruma?
en: A: Is Agam at home?

ab: uniyan taytaw! daw maya yu kantaw?
ch: B:她不在，請問你有什麼事?
en: B: She's not here, what can I do for you?

ab: i manay?
en: B: Who is it?

ab: mumu, i Pidur ku. tratruwalri driya na alreban.
en: A: Grandfather, I am Pidru, please open the door.

ab: i manay yu?
en: B: Who is it?

ab: Senayan, i Pidur ku! druwa ku mayaa kanu malinaya.
en: A: Senayan, I'm Pidur and I've come to play with you.

ab: paetreng ta lra adri marepanau.
en: A: Long time no see.

ab: aiwa! masupeng ku kanu. alamu! sadru ta padradrayaran.
ch: B:是啊!我很想念你。快來!我們好多話要聊!
en: B:Yeah! I've missed you. Come on! We have so much to talk about!

ab: katengadraw driya! trekel driya dra kulisepa!
en: B: Please sit down and have some tea.

ab: semangalan!
en: A: Thank you!

ab: trekel driya dra kulisepa!
en: B: Please have some tea.

ab: iuwa dra demalreulreu mu kulisepa iy!
en: A: (Exclamation) Your tea is delicious!

ab: mekana ta driya dra kalimudan.
en: B: Let's eat fruit!

ab: aiwa! kadalreulreu an menau ta kandri na kalimudan!
ch: B:好喔!這些水果看起來好像很甜。
en: A: Wow! These fruits seem to be very sweet.

ab: dalreu na kalimudan?
en: B: How is the fruit?

ab: aiwa! salaw dalreu.
en: A:Yes, it's really delicious.

ab: peniya lra maresiyuk dra kakerabian i ina. alamu mekana ta!
ch: A:媽媽煮好晚餐了，快來吃吧!
en: B: Mom has cooked dinner, come and eat!

ab: aiwa! semabesaba ku driya dra lima.
en: A: Okay, I'll go wash my hands.

ab: kabetreker mekan. amelri yu a sidrumayan maku.
ch: A:盡量吃喝，你又不是外人。
en: B: Try to eat and drink as much as possible, you're not an outsider.

ab: sadru lra ku inekanan. betreker ku lra.
en: A: I ate a lot, I'm full.

ab: kasadruyu mekan. adri kiyagela.
en: B: Eat more, don't be polite.

ab: aiwa! salaw imaran.
en: A:Well, it's delicious.

ab: uwaburek ku lra. an miwari ku i, druwaya ku driya menauwa kanu.
ch: A:我要離開了，下次再來看你。
en: A: I'm leaving, I'll see you next time.

ab: aiwa! marepanauwa ta driya!
en: B: Okay, goodbye.

ab: aremeng lra! uwaburek ku lra.
en: A: It's late, I'm going home.

ab: an miwari yu i, alamu driya uwadrangi maw!
en: B: Come back to play again sometime!

ab: taranapaw i dalan!
en: B: Walk slowly and carefully.

ab: aiwa! an miwari yu alamu uwadrangi kaniyam.
en: A: Okay, come to my house sometime.
